questions.question: Why does the game compare the current card with the remaining unlocked cards?
After a card locks, why is it no longer compared with other cards?
choices: It is already in the correct spot

questions.question: When sorting from Smallest → Largest, what decides the correct order?
choices: The number written on the card
The file size shown on the card

questions.question: Why does the game move forward after a card locks?
choices: The earlier spots are already correct

questions.question: Why does the game choose one card first before checking the others?
If a card is switched but does not stay in the spot, what does that mean?
choices: The first card was already correct
There is a better card to choose

questions.question: Why does the game only check unlocked cards?
choices: Because they are not in the correct order yet
Because locked cards are still wrong

questions.question: What makes sure the earlier spots stay correct during the game?
How does the minigame show how Selection Sort works?
choices: It fixes one spot at a time by checking cards
It splits the list into two parts
It keeps swapping all the cards

questions.question: What does Box A automatically choose at the start of each round?
choices: The first card that is not locked

questions.question: What is the main goal of each round?
choices: To place one correct card in its proper spot
To compare all cards many times

questions.question: What happens if the switched card is correct for that spot?
What tells the player whether to sort Smallest → Largest or Largest → Smallest?
If the player picks a card that is not the smallest (or biggest), what should they do?
choices: Compare it with other unlocked cards

questions.question: Why does the game focus on the next card after one card locks in place?
choices: Because the previous card is already in the correct spot

questions.question: What happens to the remaining cards after each correct lock?
Why is it important to check all remaining unlocked cards before switching?
choices: To make sure the correct card is chosen

questions.question: What would happen if the player ignores the sorting rule while picking cards?
choices: The sorted cards will grow faster
The locking feature will not work correctly

questions.question: How does the locking feature help players understand Selection Sort?
choices: It shows that once a card is correct, it stays there
